zh.lifeSummary: 當Jonathan Moulton於1702年6月5日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾洛金哈姆咸頓時，他的父親Robert Moulton Sr.40歲，母親Lucy Smith34歲。他於1727年12月21日與Elizabeth Lamprey在美國新罕布夏州洛金哈姆咸頓結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1735年5月22日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾洛金哈姆紐費爾茲洛金哈姆享年32歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可紐波雷波特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jonathan Moulton于1702年6月5日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾洛金哈姆咸頓时，他的父亲Robert Moulton Sr.40岁，母亲Lucy Smith34岁。他于1727年12月21日与Elizabeth Lamprey在美国新罕布什尔州洛金哈姆咸頓结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1735年5月22日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾洛金哈姆紐費爾茲洛金哈姆享年32岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可紐波雷波特。

nameMeanings.name: Moulton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly Cheshire and Lancashire): habitational name from one or more of the places called Moulton (Cheshire, Lincolnshire, Norfolk, Northamptonshire, Staffordshire, Suffolk, North Yorkshire), most of which are named with the Old English personal name Mūl(a), the Old Norse personal name Múli, or Old English mūl ‘mule’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

variants.name: Molden
meanings: metronymic from the Middle English female personal name Mold, a form of Maud, with the characteristically West Midland genitival suffix -en.

nameMeanings.name: Jonathan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, meaning ‘God has given’, composed of the same elements as those of   Matthew  , but in reverse order. This is the name of several characters in the Bible, most notably a son of King Saul, who was a devoted friend and supporter of the young David, even when David and Saul were themselves at loggerheads (1 Samuel 31; 2 Samuel 1:19–26). The name is often taken as symbolic of steadfast friendship and loyalty. Well-known bearers of the name include the Irish clergyman and writer  Jonathan Swift  (  1667-1745 ), British theatre director  Jonathan Miller  (  b. 1934 ), British actor  Jonathan Pryce  (  b. 1947 ), and British television presenter  Jonathan Ross  (  b. 1960 ).

variants.name: Johnathan
meanings: Respelling of   Jonathan  , as if a combination of   John   and   Nathan .

variants.name: Jonathen
meanings: Biblical name, meaning ‘God has given’, composed of the same elements as those of   Matthew  , but in reverse order. This is the name of several characters in the Bible, most notably a son of King Saul, who was a devoted friend and supporter of the young David, even when David and Saul were themselves at loggerheads (1 Samuel 31; 2 Samuel 1:19–26). The name is often taken as symbolic of steadfast friendship and loyalty. Well-known bearers of the name include the Irish clergyman and writer  Jonathan Swift  (  1667-1745 ), British theatre director  Jonathan Miller  (  b. 1934 ), British actor  Jonathan Pryce  (  b. 1947 ), and British television presenter  Jonathan Ross  (  b. 1960 ).

variants.name: Johnathon
meanings: Mainly U.S.: respelled form of   Jonathan  , influenced by   John .

en.lifeSummary: When Jonathan Moulton was born on 5 June 1702, in Hampton, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, his father, Robert Moulton Sr., was 40 and his mother, Lucy Smith, was 34. He married Elizabeth Lamprey on 21 December 1727, in Hampton, Rockingham, New Hampshire, United States. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 22 May 1735, in Rockingham, Newfields, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, at the age of 32, and was buried in Newburyport, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jonathan Moulton est né le 5 juin 1702, à Hampton, Rockingham, New Hampshire, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Robert Moulton Sr., avait 40 ans et sa mère, Lucy Smith, avait 34 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Lamprey le 21 décembre 1727, à Hampton, Rockingham, New Hampshire, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 22 mai 1735, à Rockingham, Newfields, Rockingham, New Hampshire, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 32 ans, et a été enterré à Newburyport, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jonathan Moulton am 5. Juni 1702 in Hampton, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Moulton Sr. 40 und seine Mutter Lucy Smith 34. Er hat am 21. Dezember 1727 in Hampton, Rockingham, New Hampshire, Vereinigte Staaten Elizabeth Lamprey geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 22. Mai 1735 im Alter von 32 Jahren in Rockingham, Newfields, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America und wurde in Newburyport, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jonathan Moulton è nato il il 5 giugno 1702 nel Hampton, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, il suo padre, Robert Moulton Sr., aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Lucy Smith, aveva 34 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Lamprey il 21 dicembre 1727, nel Hampton, Rockingham, New Hampshire, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 22 maggio 1735, nel Rockingham, Newfields, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, all'età di 32 anni, e fu sepolto a Newburyport, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.Sawyers Hill Cemetery, Newburyport, Esse: イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーエセックスニューブリプオルト
ja.lifeSummary: Jonathan Moultonが1702年6月5日にイギリス植民地アメリカニュー ハンプシュアイアロクインガムハンプトンで生まれた時，父Robert Moulton Sr.は40歳，母Lucy Smithは34歳であった。1727年12月21日にアメリカ合衆国ニューハンプシャー州ロクインガムハンプトンでElizabeth Lampreyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1735年5月22日にイギリス植民地アメリカニュー ハンプシュアイアロクインガムニューフィールズロクインガムで32歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーエセックスニューブリプオルトにて埋葬された。

ko.Rockingham, Newfields, Rockingham, New H: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 록잉함 뉴필드즈 록잉함
ko.Hampton, Rockingham, New Hampshire, Brit: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 록잉함 함프턴
ko.Hampton, New Hampshire, British Colonial: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 함프턴
ko.Sawyers Hill Cemetery, Newburyport, Esse: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 뉴버이포트
ko.lifeSummary: Jonathan Moulton(이)가 1702년 6월 5일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 록잉함 함프턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Moulton Sr.(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Lucy Smith(은)는 34세였다. 그는 1727년 12월 21일 미국 뉴햄프셔 주 록잉함 함프턴에서 Elizabeth Lamprey(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1735년 5월 22일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 록잉함 뉴필드즈 록잉함에서 32세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 뉴버이포트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jonathan Moulton nasceu em 5 de junho de 1702, em Hampton, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, seu pai, Robert Moulton Sr., tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Lucy Smith, tinha 34 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Lamprey em 21 de dezembro de 1727, em Hampton, Rockingham, Nova Hampshire, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 22 de maio de 1735, em Rockingham, Newfields, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, com 32 anos, e foi sepultado em Newburyport, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jonathan Moulton родился 5 июня 1702 г. в местности хамптон, роккингхам, ню хампшир, бритиш колоняль амирика, его отцу по имени Robert Moulton Sr. было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Lucy Smith, 34. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Lamprey 21 декабря 1727 г. в местности хамптон, роккингхам, Нью-Гэмпшир, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 22 мая 1735 г. в местности роккингхам, нюфиелдс, роккингхам, ню хампшир, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 32 лет и был похоронен в местности нюбурипорт, эссекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jonathan Moulton nació el 5 de junio de 1702, en Hampton, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, su papá, Robert Moulton Sr., tenía 40 años y su mamá, Lucy Smith, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Lamprey el 21 de diciembre de 1727, en Hampton, Rockingham, Nuevo Hampshire, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 22 de mayo de 1735, en Rockingham, Newfields, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, a la edad de 32 años, y fue sepultado en Newburyport, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.
